targets.rawSql:
SELECT FROM_UNIXTIME(FLOOR(a.clock / 3600) * 3600) AS time,
  CASE a.status WHEN 1 THEN 'Enviado' WHEN 2 THEN 'Falhado' WHEN 0 THEN 'Em fila' ELSE 'Novo' END AS metric,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM alerts a
WHERE a.alerttype = 0 AND $__unixEpochFilter(a.clock)
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1

SELECT FROM_UNIXTIME(a.clock) AS Hora, COALESCE(mt.name, '?') AS Via, a.sendto AS Destinatario, a.subject AS Assunto, a.status AS Estado, a.retries AS Tentativas, NULLIF(a.error, '') AS Erro
FROM alerts a
LEFT JOIN media_type mt ON mt.mediatypeid = a.mediatypeid
WHERE a.alerttype = 0 AND $__unixEpochFilter(a.clock)
ORDER BY a.clock DESC
LIMIT 200

SELECT TRIM(CONCAT(COALESCE(u.name,''), ' ', COALESCE(u.surname,''))) AS Utilizador, u.username AS Login, mt.name AS Via, mt.status AS Mediatype, m.sendto AS Destino, m.active AS 'Media do utilizador'
FROM media m
JOIN users u ON u.userid = m.userid
JOIN media_type mt ON mt.mediatypeid = m.mediatypeid
ORDER BY u.username, mt.name

title: N1 · Visão Geral · Notificações — Triggers e envios
